ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Electricity, Transportation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector's activities */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Type of sector (e.g., industrial, transportation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_parent_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the emission source (e.g., Coal Mining, Aviation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the emission source's impact */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector related to the emission source */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission (e.g., CO2, CH4) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_sources_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North America) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region's characteristics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country within the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., continent, country, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting_periods" (
  "reporting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reporting period */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the reporting period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the reporting period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of reporting period (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reporting period (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reporting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of data access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific data accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data being assessed */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector related to the assessment */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the emission source related to the assessment */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating quality (1-100) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments on the assessment */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the data quality is assessed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality assessment was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES emission_sources ("source_id")
)
